message:
test(fcp-sdk): expand test coverage for formatting, retry, runtime, and SDK core

Add extensive unit tests across fcp-sdk modules to harden edge-case
behavior that was previously only exercised through integration tests.

- formatting.rs: +288 lines — FormatMode Debug/Copy traits, validate_html
  edge cases (empty, nested, self-closing, entities), validate_markdown
  edge cases (double-escape, trailing backslash), Formatter render_with_fallback
  for control chars and plain-mode newline preservation
- lib.rs: +308 lines — SDK initialization paths, config validation, feature
  flag toggling, builder pattern chaining, default overrides
- retry.rs: +233 lines — backoff calculation, jitter bounds, max-retries
  enforcement, retry-on-specific-error filtering, timeout integration
- runtime.rs: +458 lines — async runtime lifecycle, task spawning, graceful
  shutdown sequencing, signal handling, resource cleanup ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
